canEditMembers.description: Whether you can edit the members of this group.  For example, Directory Services group members cannot be edited.  Populated on a single group get.

hasGroupOwners.description: If true, the group is owned by specific other users/groups. If false, if it is owned by Group Administrators.

ipAddressRestrictions.description: Array of IP Address Restrictions for the group.

isEditable.description: Whether you have permission to edit this group

isPlatform.description: Whether the group is a Platform Group

owners.description: The owners for the group, both users and groups

synchronized.description: Whether the group is synchronized with Active Directory

synchronizeNow.description: Active Directory Sync will only pull in members for domain groups that have this set to true.

systemGroup.description: Whether the group is an Active Directory system group
